meaning: n.火焰,光辉,光芒,热情,激情
examples: The custom of lighting the Olympic flame goes back centuries.
Can the heart's flame die in the flame of the funeral pile?
In an interview Welch recalls, K.P. was the igniter of the flame for GE coming to India.
In 2009, part of the code from the Flame platform was used in Stuxnet.
